channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: alternbits/awesome-cuda-books
item.description: A curated list of best cuda programming books

item.title: nkzw-tech/codiff
item.description: a fast local diff viewer

item.title: boona13/mykonos-island-voxels
item.description: A browser-based isometric island builder with the soft, sun-bleached look of Mykonos. Vanilla ES modules, no bundler, mobile-friendly.

item.title: davidhckh/portfolio-2025
item.description: (no description)

item.title: PLFJY/ContextMenuMgr
item.description: A Windows context menu management tool with new menu monitoring

item.title: gi-dellav/zerostack
item.description: Minimalistic coding agent written in Rust, optimized for memory footprint and performance

item.title: devpardo/mannylapidamaker
item.description: Manny Lapida Maker Frontend

item.title: Kappaemme-git/codex-complexity-optimizer
item.description: Codex skill for safe codebase complexity analysis and performance optimization reports

item.title: crynta/terax-ai
item.description: Lightweight (7MB) AI terminal emulator (ADE) built in Rust & Tauri & React

item.title: openclaw/clawpatch
item.description: Review code. Patch bugs. Land PRs.

item.title: chiennv2000/orthrus
item.description: Fast, lossless LLM inference via dual-view diffusion decoding.

item.title: SubamanojJ-2004/gta-5-mod-menu
item.description: Ultimate Enhancement Toolkit for GTA V — powerful mod menu with ESP, vehicle spawner, recovery features, and clean UI

item.title: facebookresearch/vggt-omega
item.description: [CVPR 2026 Oral] VGGT Omega

item.title: shang-zhu/violin
item.description: Open-source Video Translation Skill

item.title: vercel-labs/zero
item.description: The programming language for agents

item.title: antirez/ds4
item.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal and CUDA

item.title: DenisSergeevitch/agents-best-practices
item.description: Provider-neutral Agent Skill for Codex, Claude Code, and agentic harness design.

item.title: TheSentora/Crypto-Web3-Copilot-App
item.description: AI-powered Web3 Copilot built with Next.js

item.title: chrystyan96/ExecFence
item.description: NPM Package

item.title: earendil-works/pi
item.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

item.title: raindrop-ai/workshop
item.description: Give your coding agent the power to write and run agent evals.

item.title: yetone/native-feel-skill
item.description: An Agent Skill for designing cross-platform desktop apps that feel native — distilled from Raycast's 2.0 deep-dive and reverse engineering of Raycast Beta.app. Eight architectural tenets, four-layer architecture, WebKit/WebView2 survival guide, 75-item ship audit.

item.title: neilsonnn/image-blaster
item.description: An image-to-world skillset for Claude.

item.title: nexu-io/html-anything
item.description: ✨ The agentic HTML editor — your local AI agent writes the HTML, you ship it. 🚀 75 Skills × 9 Surfaces (magazine · deck · poster · XHS / tweet · prototype · data report · Hyperframes) 🛡️ Sandboxed preview · 📤 1-click to WeChat / X / Zhihu / HTML / PNG 🔑 Zero API key — Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Gemini / Copilot / OpenCode / Qwen / Aider.

item.title: trong776/Roblox-cheat-2026
item.description: Developer utilities for Roblox game testing — Lua tools for exploring game mechanics and performance. MIT License.

item.title: trong776/Roblox-Hub-2026
item.description: Developer utilities for Roblox game testing — Lua tools for exploring game mechanics and performance. MIT License.

item.title: Tencent/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
item.description: TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

item.title: Nightmare-Eclipse/YellowKey
item.description: YellowKey Bitlocker Bypass Vulnerability

item.title: chrisbanes/skills
item.description: Skills for Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and Android development

item.title: HermannBjorgvin/Clawdmeter
item.description: ESP32 desk dashboard that shows Claude Code usage

item.title: FULU-Foundation/OrcaSlicer-bambulab
item.description: (no description)

item.title: cactus-compute/needle
item.description: 26m function call model that runs on incredibly small devices

item.title: TwilitRealm/dusklight
item.description: Dusklight brings a classic adventure to PC and mobile platforms with a variety of fixes and improvements.

item.title: anthropics/claude-for-legal
item.description: A suite of plugins for legal workflows

item.title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

item.title: esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
item.description: DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

item.title: microsoft/waza
item.description: CLI / Framework for Agent Skills - create, test, measure and improve skill quality and effectiveness

item.title: RadianceToadAmend/cs2-overlay-utility
item.description: CS2 external overlay tool — memory reader, entity ESP, and visual aids. D3D11 render, no injection. For educational purposes.

item.title: openclaw/Peekaboo
item.description: Peekaboo is a macOS CLI & optional MCP server that enables AI agents to capture screenshots of applications, or the entire system, with optional visual question answering through local or remote AI models.
